question: T-005 has been logging elevated load current readings over the past week. Retrieve the recent sensor data and determine whether current readings are abnormally high relative to the recent baseline, and flag the peak recorded value and when it occurred.
effective_question: T-005 has been logging elevated load current readings over the past week. Retrieve the recent sensor data and determine whether current readings are abnormally high relative to the recent baseline (threshold: ?), and flag the peak recorded value (value: ?, time: ?) and when it occurred.

clarifying_questions: What is the threshold for determining abnormally high load current readings?
What is the recent baseline time window for comparison?
assumptions: The sensor data is available and accessible
The baseline data is up-to-date and accurate
The peak recorded value is the highest value within the recent baseline time window
